- task: PowerShell@2
  displayName: Debug publish project path
  inputs:
    targetType: inline
    script: |
      Write-Host "Current directory:"
      Get-Location

      Write-Host ""
      Write-Host "Matching AzureFunctions csproj files:"
      Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Filter WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.csproj | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }

      Write-Host ""
      Write-Host "Matching all csproj files:"
      Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Filter *.csproj | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }
